Home / Fortnite / Fortnite by Game Mode / Battle Royale / Items (Battle Royale) / Weapons (Battle Royale) / Ranged Weapons (Battle Royale) / Assault Weapons / Full List of Items

Full List of Items

Contents

  • 1 Notes
  • 2 Related Pages
  • 3 List of Items
  • 4 Trivia
  • 5 References

Overview

There is a significant number of weapons and items in Battle Royale and Creative. Below is a full list of every item to ever be introduced into both modes, as well as weapons exclusive to collaborations, and limited time modes. This list does not contain any items from Save the World or LEGO Fortnite, unless overlapping.

Notes

Notes[]

  • Available items are currently in Fortnite: Battle Royale and/or in Fortnite: Creative.
  • Unavailable items are within the game files as a WID or schematic but not in Fortnite: Save the World.
  • Exclusive items are currently in Fortnite: Save the World
  • Removed items are not present in-game or in the game files as a WID (Weapon ID).
  • Items with "Both" as the mode are in Fortnite: Battle Royale and Fortnite: Creative .
  • Item rarities have been omitted from this list, to see item rarities browse an items page.
  • Items with "Legacy" at the start of the name are officially called Legacy items by Epic Games. Items that end with (Legacy) in parentheses aren't officially called legacy items by Epic but are still labeled as legacy items for clarification purposes.

Unique Mythics
Victory Crown A crown given to players who get a Victory Royale. Battle Royale Available
Raptor's Claw Required for a Huntmaster to locate Choppa parts. Impossible Escape! Removed
Golden Ticket Pick up these tickets as fast as you can to win the game. Rally Royale Removed
Base
Wood Basic Material obtained from wooden structures, such as trees. Both Available
Stone Basic Material obtained from stone structures, such as rocks. Both Available
Metal Basic Material obtained from metal structures, such as vehicles. Both Available
Bars Currency used to purchase items across Battle Royale matches. Battle Royale Available
Dill Bit Currency used to purchase items from the Black Market. Battle Royale Unavailable
Unstable Element Used to open locked doors in the particle accelerator tunnels. Battle Royale Available
Rivalry Credits Currency used to purchase items from the Rivalry Screen. Battle Royale Available
Key Used to open Vaults and Holo-Chests. Both Available
Animal Bones Resource obtained by eliminating Animals. Both Available
Stink Sac Resource obtained by eliminating Frogs. Both Available
Mechanical Parts Resource obtained by from harvesting cars. Both Available
Cube Monster Parts Used to upgrade Sideways weaponry. Both Available
Nuts and Bolts Used to change weapons into their alternative versions Battle Royale Unavailable

  • Subpage Link: Full List of Items/Medallions
Name Icon Description Modes Status
Collaborations
Kenny's Respawn Token Mythic Medallion that grants immediate revival upon elimination. Can only be used once. Battle Royale Unavailable
Megazord's Medallion Medallion obtained by dealing heavy damage to Megazord. Reveals enemy players temporarily. Battle Royale Unavailable
Phasma's Blaster Medallion Medallion belonging to Captain Phasma.

Reducing cooldown speed and increases the amount of time blasters can fire before overheating.

Battle Royale Unavailable
First Blood Medallion The first hit from a firearm magazine causes an explosion. Refreshes with reloading. Battle Royale Unavailable
Godzilla Medallion Gain charges of Godzilla Fragment Dash over time for quick bursts of mobility. Battle Royale Unavailable
Doombot's Siphon Medallion Medallion belonging to Doombot. Grants healing siphon effect on enemy elimination. Battle Royale Unavailable
Mysterio's Stealth Medallion Medallion belonging to Mysterio. Turns the user invisible while crouching. Battle Royale Unavailable
Emma Frost's Reveal Medallion Medallion belonging to Emma Frost. Reveals enemy players temporarily. Battle Royale Unavailable
Peter Griffin's Medallion Medallion belonging to Peter Griffin. Grants access to the Snooty Steppes vault. Battle Royale Unavailable
Blitz Royale Exclusives
Saitama's Medallion Medallion obtained by claiming the Capture Point at Anvil Park. Pickaxe swings are slower but instantly eliminate players and destroy structures. Blitz Royale Unavailable
8th Birthday Medallion Chance to receive Birthday Presents! on enemy elimination. Blitz Royale Unavailable
Blitz Reveal Medallion Reveals enemy players temporarily. Blitz Royale Unavailable
Leap Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to Mercenary Kor. Sprint jumps have a Low Gravity effect and cloak the user. Blitz Royale Unavailable
Mask Maker Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to Mask Maker Daigo. Improves reload speed and provides a passive 1 Shield per second regeneration, up to 50 Shield. Blitz Royale Unavailable
Base
Surge Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to the Onimorph Queen at The Hive. Increases movement speed and gives a burst of speed when sliding. Battle Royale Unavailable
Springleg Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to the belonging to the Onimorph Queen at Demon's Debris. Grants the ability to double jump and immunity to fall damage. Battle Royale Unavailable
Carapace Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to the Onimorph Queen at Ranger's Ruin. Grants 50 Health and/or 50 Shield on enemy elimination and passively gives 3 Shield per second up to 50 Shield. Battle Royale Unavailable
Shrouded Striker Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to Mercenary Kor. Sprint jumps have a Low Gravity effect and cloak the user. Battle Royale Unavailable
Infernal Defenses Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to Mask Maker Daigo. Improves reload speed and provides a passive 1 Shield per second regeneration, up to 50 Shield. Battle Royale Unavailable
Unstoppable Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to Fletcher Kane. Grants the player increased sprint speed and the ability to bash into players. Battle Royale Unavailable
Super Shield Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to Shogun X. Summons a Shield Bubble Jr. around the player when using consumable healing items. Battle Royale Unavailable
Night Rose Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to The Night Rose. Constantly reloads the players held weapon. Battle Royale Unavailable
Shogun X Medallion Unique Medallion belonging to Shogun X. Grants infinite stamina, and cloaks into the dark while sprinting. Battle Royale Unavailable
Birthday Medallion Unique Medallion found in Birthday Presents! Periodically summons balloons when held. Does not mark the player on the map when held. Battle Royale Unavailable
The Machinist's Medallion Medallion belonging to The Machinist. Grants access to the Redline Rig garage. Replenish shield when held. Battle Royale Unavailable
Ringmaster Scarr's Medallion Medallion belonging to Ringmaster Scarr. Grants access to the Nitrodrome garage. Receive a damage bonus and gain infinite ammo when held. Battle Royale Unavailable
Megalo Don's Medallion Medallion belonging to Megalo Don. Grants access to the Brutal Beachhead garage. Gain infinite Nitro when held. Battle Royale Unavailable
Aspect of Agility Travel through the Spirit World! Gain charges of Underworld Dash over time for quick bursts of mobility. Battle Royale Unavailable
Aspect of Combat Prepare for War!Imbues ranged weapons with increased damage. Battle Royale Unavailable
Aspect of Speed The vigor of Zeus!Run faster and jump higher while sprinting. Battle Royale Unavailable
Aspect of Siphon Power to restore vitality!Grants healing siphon effect on enemy elimination. Battle Royale Unavailable
Montague's Medallion Medallion belonging to Montague. Grants access to the Grand Glacier vault. Battle Royale Unavailable
Nisha's Medallion Medallion belonging to Nisha. Grants access to the Fencing Fields vault. Battle Royale Unavailable
Oscar's Medallion Medallion belonging to Oscar. Grants access to the Lavish Lair vault. Battle Royale Unavailable
Valeria's Medallion Medallion belonging to Valeria. Grants access to the Reckless Railways vault. Battle Royale Unavailable

Name Icon Description Modes Status
Collaborations
Rita Repulsa's Boon Gain Light Ammo, Medium Ammo, and Shells over time. Battle Royale Available
Base
Super Soldier: Rank S+ Unlimited Stamina. Increased Reload Speed. Reduced Spread and Recoil. Increased Tactical Sprint Speed. Battle Royale Available
Super Soldier: Rank S Reduced stamina consumption. Increased Reload Speed. Reduced Spread and Recoil Battle Royale Available
Super Soldier: Rank A Reduced stamina consumption. Increased Reload Speed. Battle Royale Available
Super Soldier: Rank B Reduced stamina consumption. Battle Royale Available
Storm Forecast Boon You can see the next storm circle. Battle Royale Available
Agile Aiming Boon Aiming down sights has reduced recoil and spread, and increased movement speed. Battle Royale Available
Extended Magazine Boon Increased magazine size. Battle Royale Available
Combat Acrobat Boon Parkour partially reloads your equipped weapon, and the amount reloaded goes up with each Hero Rank.

Rank S: Reloads all your weapons.

Battle Royale Available
Heightened Senses Boon Players who attack you are marked, and the duration they’re marked increases with each Hero Rank.

Rank S: Its cooldown is lowered.

Battle Royale Available
Speed Healer Boon Sprint while using healing items and gain Slap afterwards, with the duration of Slap increasing with each Hero Rank.

Rank S: Gain Slap immediately when using a healing item.

Battle Royale Available
Storm Caller Boon Replenishes Shield while in the Storm, with the amount replenished going up with each Hero Rank.

Rank S: Gives storm forecast.

Battle Royale Available
Surging Speed Boon Decreases the amount of stamina consumed and increases sprint speed, and the stamina consumption decreases and sprint speed increases with each Hero Rank.

Rank S: Sprint Speed is greatly increased.

Battle Royale Available
Adrenaline Rush Boon Gain the Slap effect when you Mantle, Hurdle, or Wall Jump. Battle Royale Unavailable
Gold Ammo Boon Receive ammo when you pick up Gold Bars. Battle Royale Unavailable
Gold Rush Boon Opening containers grants the Gold Rush effect. Battle Royale Unavailable
Greed Boon Receive extra Gold Bars from containers and eliminations. Battle Royale Unavailable
Vulture Boon Enemies who are eliminated will be marked on the map for a short time. Battle Royale Unavailable
Fire Boon Increases the player's reload speed. Battle Royale Unavailable
Water Boon Swimming heals health and shield for the player and nearby swimming teammates. Battle Royale Unavailable
Wind Boon Increases the players movement speed while holding a Pickaxe. Battle Royale Unavailable
Void Boon Downing a player reveals other nearby players. Battle Royale Unavailable
Blitz
Adrenaline Rush Boon Gain the Slap effect when you Mantle, Hurdle, or Wall Jump. Blitz Royale Available
Agile Aiming Boon Aiming down sights has reduced recoil and spread, and increased movement speed. Blitz Royale Available

Extended Magazine Boon Increased magazine size. Blitz Royale Available
Fire Boon Reload your weapons faster. Blitz Royale Available
Gold Rush Boon Opening containers grants the Gold Rush effect. Blitz Royale Available
Heightened Senses Boon Players who attack you are marked. Blitz Royale Available
Icy Slide Boon Gain icy speed boost while sliding. Blitz Royale Available
Soaring Sprints Boon Higher sprint jumps with Low Gravity. Blitz Royale Available
Speed Healer Boon Sprint while using healing items and gain Slap afterwards. Blitz Royale Available
Storm Caller Boon Replenishes Shield while in the Storm. Blitz Royale Available
Storm Forecast Boon You can see the next storm circle. Blitz Royale Available
Swift Combat Boon Move faster when scoped in or reloading. Blitz Royale Available
Void Boon Knocking players reveals others nearby. Blitz Royale Available
Vulture Boon Enemies who are eliminated will be marked on the map for a short time. Blitz Royale Available
Wind Boon Move faster while your pickaxe is equipped. Blitz Royale Available
Zero Chance Boon Gain Zero Point Dash when you break opponents' shields. Blitz Royale Available

Burst Quad Launcher Exotic variant of the Quad Launcher, shoots a 2-round burst of rockets. Both Available
Lawless Shockwave Rocket Launcher Exotic variant of the Rocket Launcher, shoots a shockwave rocket which deals heavy knockback to anyone in the explosion radius. Both Available
Lawful Shockwave Rocket Launcher Exotic variant of the Rocket Launcher, shoots a shockwave rocket which deals heavy knockback to anyone in the explosion radius. Both Available
Unique Mythics
Spire Assassin's Recycler Boss variant of the Recycler used and dropped by the Spire Assassin AI. Both Available
Human Bill's Arc-Lightning Gun Boss variant of the Arc-Lightning Gun that is used and dropped by the Human Bill AI. Both Available
Shogun X's Fire Oni Mask Boss variant of the Fire Oni Mask dropped by the Shogun X AI. Both Available
Base
Arc-Lightning Gun A gun that fires destructive lightning rays that spread to nearby players, vehicles and structures. Both Available
Plasma Burst Laser A high-powered laser that periodically releases an explosive burst. Both Available
Explosive Goo Gun Shoot a trail of explosive goo which will cover players and structures upon landing. Both Available
Plasma Cannon Shoots a large energy ball which pierces structures and damages enemies. Both Available
Swarmstrike Rocket Launcher that shoots a barrage of laser-guided missiles. Both Available
Bug Blaster Organic weapon which fires a small beam of explosive plasma or can be charged to fire a powerful ball of energy. Both Available
Flare Gun Shoots a projectile that marks nearby opponents and ignites structures. Both Available
Firework Flare Gun Shoots a firework projectile that marks nearby opponents and ignites structures. Both Available
Proximity Grenade Launcher Projectiles explode in proximity to players. Both Available
Snowball Launcher Seasonal Version of the Grenade Launcher. Grenades explode on impact. Both Available
Egg Launcher Seasonal version of the Grenade Launcher. Grenades bounce off surfaces. Both Available
Grenade Launcher Shoots grenades which explode on a timer. Both Available
Sticky Grenade Launcher Tactical launcher that fires sticky grenades. Both Available
Seven Cluster Cannon Charged launcher that fires a fragmenting cluster bomb dealing heavy damage and knocking back players. Battle Royale Unavailable
Recycler Harvests resources as ammo. Both Available
Quad Launcher Fires up to four explosive projectiles before reloading. Both Available
Fire Oni Mask A mask that sends explosive screaming masks that home towards opponents. Both Available
Guided Missile Rocket Launcher that shoots missiles which are controlled by the player. Both and Fortnite OG Available
Anvil Rocket Launcher Shoots a rocket high into the air which falls down onto a target. Has lock on capability. Both Available
Rocket Launcher (Legacy) Fires a slow moving explosive rocket. Fortnite OG Available
Rocket Launcher Fires a slow moving explosive rocket. Both Available
Pumpkin Launcher Seasonal version of the Rocket Launcher. Both Available

Name Icon Description Modes Status
Collaborations
Last Call Turn into Ghost Face and slash enemies with a knife. Use your phone to call and mark nearby Enemies and track down their location. Battle Royale Available
Thorn Ripper Swing chains at players up close or pull them in from a distance. Battle Royale Available
Cartoon Chainsaw Powerful chainsaw with a slash, sprint, ground pound, and rush ability. Rush action uses fuel which recharges over time. Battle Royale Unavailable
Rumi's Empowered Sword Heavy sword with a melee combo attack, ground slam, and a powerful energy slash projectile. Both Available
Forsaken Vow Blade A katana that can perform melee combo attack, downward melee attack, and dash Battle Royale Unavailable
Leonardo's Katanas Unleash your Turtle Power with a melee combo, lightning fast dash, and thunderous midair slam! Both Available
Raphael's Sai Unleash your Turtle Power with a melee combo, lightning fast dash, and thunderous midair slam! Both Available
Michelangelo's Nunchaku Unleash your Turtle Power with a melee combo, lightning fast dash, and thunderous midair slam! Both Available
Donatello's Staff Unleash your Turtle Power with a melee combo, lightning fast dash, and thunderous midair slam! Both Available
Dual Zangetsu Ichigo Kurosaki’s zanpakuto with the power to fire crescent mooned projectiles. Blitz Royale and Delulu Avaliable
Lightsabers An elegant weapon for a more civilized age. Both Available
Sub-Zero's Kombat Kit A powerful Kombat weapon that executes an icy martial arts kombo. You can also use Ice Slide to bolt toward your enemies. Battle Royale Available
Scorpion's Kombat Kit A powerful Kombat weapon that executes a fiery martial arts kombo. You can also use Hookshot to drag your enemies to you. Battle Royale Available
Shuri's Black Panther Claws Slash enemies on the ground. Pounce in the air or while sprinting. Build up kinetic energy to supercharge your claws. Increases sprint speed while equipped Battle Royale Unavailable
Wolverine's Claws Slash enemies on the ground. Spin slash in the air. Regenerate health on hit. Battle Royale Unavailable
She-Hulk's Fists Punch players and lunge with an air attack. Battle Royale Removed
ODM Gear Pulls the player towards the intended location and allows the player to swing from said location or rush towards a target with sharp, damaging swords. Battle Royale Removed
Lucille Spiked bat that can be used normally for a basic swing attack or charged for a powerful swing that deals heavy damage. Blitz Royale and Creative Available
Thor's Stormbreaker Powerful Axe that can be swung up close, thrown, or swung midair for a lunge attack. Endgame Unavailable
Unique Mythics
Howler Claws Slash, Dash and Hunt. Howl to mark nearby Enemies and track down their location. Battle Royale Unavailable
Thorne's Vampiric Blade Boss variant of the Kinetic Blade used and dropped by the Kado Thorne AI. Both Available
Blitz Grapple Blade Mythic version of the Grapple Blade that has an extra grapple charge. Blitz Royale Available
Blitz Kneecapper Mythic version of The Kneecapper that consumes less durability. Blitz Royale Available
Foundation's Power Gloves Mythic Seven Power Gloves with a higher ammo reserve. Both Available
Megalo Don's Nitro Fists Boss variant of the Nitro Fists used and dropped by the Megalo Don AI. Both Available
Blitz Chains of Hades Mythic version of the Chains of Hades. Both Available

Infinity Blade Mythic sword which deals high damage and gives increased HP. Both Available
Reforged Infinity Blade Mythic sword which deals high damage and gives increased HP, movement speed, and reduced stamina. Battle Royale Available
Pickaxe
Pickaxe Melee Weapon mainly used to harvest materials, but can deal low damage to players. Both Available

Basic Sword Sword that can be created using the Melee Designer device. Creative Available
Basic Hammer Hammer that can be created using the Melee Designer device. Creative Available
Grapple Blade Pulls the player towards the intended location and allows the player to swing a sharp blade that damages enemies. Both Available
Sideways Scythe Scythe with Swing, Charge, and Jump actions. Both Available
Kingsman Umbrella with Swing and Block actions, can block some damage and allows temporary gliding when using mid-air. Battle Royale Removed
Kinetic Blade Futuristc Katana with Slash and Dash actions, Dash action uses charges which recharge over time. Both Available
Typhoon Blade A Katana imbued with mystic winds, allowing for increased speed and a cyclonic slash attack. Both Available

Seven Power Gloves Grants the wearer unique dash abilities and empowers their punches with knockback. Both Available
Nitro Fists Unleash a fiery flurry of punches and uppercuts on the ground. Perform a meteoric slam in the air. Both Available
Chains of Hades Swing chains at players up close or pull them in from a distance. Both Available
Chainsaw Powerful chainsaw with a slash, sprint, ground pound, and rush ability. Rush action uses fuel which recharges over time. Both Available

Falcon Scout A player controlled drone, that can mark enemies and pick up items or knocked (DBNO) players. Both Available

Black Panther's Kinetic Armor Absorb damage and release a shockwave that damages and knocks back enemies. Battle Royale Removed

Zoey's Bubble Shield Deploys a small dome around the grenade which blocks non-piercing damage and heals shields. Also behaves as a speaker that plays music. Both Available
Jebediah's Protective Helm Protects the user from headshot damage until it flies off. Battle Royale Available

Icy Feet Grants the Icy Feet Effect to the user at will. Battle Royale Unavailable

Gliders Allows the player to redeploy their glider above a certain height. Both Available
Wingsuit Launch up and soar through the air. Both Available
Skyline Deployer Deploys a zipline at your aimed location. Both Available
Balloon Allows the player to fall slower, float, or fly upward with 1-3 balloons. Both Available
Crash Pad Generates an inflatable pad which launches entities into the air and negates fall damage. Both Available
Inflate-A-Bull Player puts on an inflatable Bull, increases their movement speed by bouncing across terrain. Both Available
Bass Boost propels players backwards, creating a dense soundwave that deals heavy damage to structures and pushes enemies away, dealing small damage. Both Available
Nitro Splash gives all players and vehicles in radius the Nitro Effect when used. Both Available
Rocket Ram Use to bust through walls and launch into the air, then smash back into the ground for even more destruction! Both Available

Firefly Jar A throwable that ignites structures on impact. Both Available

Boom Box Constantly damages buildings within a radius. Both Available

Name Icon Description Mode Status
Collaborations
Tomato (The Simpsons) Heals health over time. Can be used while moving. Battle Royale Available
Tomato (???) Heals 20 Effective Health, temporarily grants the Low Gravity Effect. Battle Royale Available
Blinky Fish Heals 15 Health, temporarily grants the Zero Point Power Effect. Can be used while moving. Battle Royale Available
Chug Splash (The Simpsons) Heals 20 Effective Health. Battle Royale Available
Super Squishee Heals 25 Effective Health, temporarily grants the Slap Effect. Can be used while moving. Both Available
Krusty Burger Heals health and shields over time. Can be used while moving. Battle Royale Available
Nuka-Cola Heals a small amount of Health immediately and Shields over time. Grants the consumer 1 Bar after using. Can be used while moving. Battle Royale Unavailable
Juice's Chug Cannon Heals 15 Effective Health, recharges over time. Gives Low Gravity Effect to players in the splash zone. Battle Royale Removed
Godzilla's Fragment Heals 40 Effective Health over time. Grants 3 dash charges. Battle Royale Unavailable
Mira's X-tra Spicy Ramyeon Heals 50 Effective Health over time and grants the Speed Boost Effect. Can be used while moving. Both Available
Cheesy Poofs Heals 10 health per tick, up to 300 HP. Can be thrown to teammates to heal them 10 hp or thrown to enemies to deal 10 damage. Battle Royale Available
Chug Jug (The Simpsons) Heals 10 health per tick, up to 200 effective health. Can be used while moving. Battle Royale Unavailable
Scooby Snacks Heals 10 health per tick, up to 250 effective health. Can be used while moving and sprinting. Temporarily grants the Slap Effect. Battle Royale Unavailable
Caduceus Staff Heals yourself or teammates 5 health per tick, up to 300 effective health. Can buff teammates' damage. Battle Royale Available
Exotics
Chili Chug Splash Exotic variant of the Chug Splash, Heals 20 Effective Health, temporarily grants the Speed Boost Effect. Both Available
Spicy Slapperoni Slice Exotic variant of the Slapperoni Slice, Heals 35 Effective Health, grants both the Speed Boost Effect and Slap Effect. Fortnite: Reload Available
Super Slap Splash Exotic variant of the Slap Splash, heals 30 Effective Health, temporarily grants the Slap Effect. Both Available
Lawless Slap Cannon Heals 20 Effective Health, recharges over time. Gives the Slap Effect to players in the splash zone. Has limited durability. Both Available
Chug Cannon Heals 15 Effective Health, recharges over time. Both Available
Exotic SlapBerry Fizz Heals 5 health per second, up to 300 effective health. Grants the Low Gravity Effect and Slap Effect in a small radius around the player. Can be used while moving Both Available
Lawless Slap Jug Heals 10 health per second, up to 400 effective health. Can be used while moving. Temporarily grants the Slap Effect. Both Available
Unique Mythics
Golden Truffle Heals 100 Shield. Battle Royale Unavailable
Ocean's Bottomless Chug Jug Boss variant of the Chug Jug dropped by the Ocean AI, recharges over time. Both Available
Effect Only Consumables which only grant the player an effect.
Hop Rocks Temporarily grants the Low Gravity Effect. Both Available
Shadow Stone Temporarily grants the Shadow Form Effect. Battle Royale Unavailable
Glitched Transforms into a random foraged consumable every few seconds. Battle Royale Unavailable
Zero Point Crystals Temporarily grants the Zero Point Power Effect. Battle Royale Unavailable
Golden Egg Gives the player 350 Bars when opened. Battle Royale Unavailable
Zero Point Pretzel Heals 0 Health, temporarily grants the Zero Point Power Effect. Both Available

Apple Heals 5 health. Both Available
Banana Heals 5 Health. Both Available
Ice Cream Cone Heals 5 Health. Both Available
Pepper Heals 5 Health, temporarily grants the Speed Boost Effect. Both Available

Cabbage Heals 10 Health over time. Both Available
Corn Heals 10 Health over time. Both Available
Candy Corn Heals 10 Health over time. Both Available
Bandage (OG) Heals 15 Health, up to 75% Health. Can move while using. Fortnite OG Available
Bandage Heals 15 Health, up to 75% Health. Can move while using. Both Available
Legacy Bandage Heals 15 Health, up to 75% Health. Creative Available
Small Fry Heals 15 Health, up to 75% Health. Both Available
Klomberry Heals 10 Health, used to feed Klombo Wildlife. Battle Royale Removed
Meat Heals 15 Health, used to distract some Wildlife. Both Available
Stink Fish Heals 20 Health, when thrown creates a Stink Cloud on impact. Both Available
Flopper Heals 40 Health. Can be used while moving. Both Available
Snowy Flopper Heals 40 Health, temporarily grants the Icy Feet Effect. Both Available
Med Kit Heals up to 100 Health. Can move while using. Both Available

Med-Mist Heals 5 Health every second used, can be used on teammates. Both Available

Guzzle Juice Heals 2 Health every second until 100% Health, stops when damaged. Can be used while moving. Both Available

Shadow Flopper Heals 15 Health, temporarily grants the Shadow Form Effect. Both Available

Bandage Bazooka Heals 15 health, can be shot at players. Both Available
Hop Flopper Heals 15 Health, temporarily grants the Low Gravity Effect. Both Available

Chug Splash Heals 20 Effective Health. Both Available

Jellyfish Heals 20 Effective Health. Can be used while moving. Both Available
Water Sprite Heals 20 effective health immediately and then heals over time in a small radius. Both Available

Slurpfish Heals 40 Effective Health. Can be used while moving. Both Available

Lil' Whip's Special Serve Heals 100 Health and Shield. Both Available
Slurp Juice (Epic) Epic version of slurp juice that heals 2 effective Health every tick up to +80 effective health. Can be used while moving. Both Available
Slurp Juice (Legendary) Legendary version of slurp juice that heals 3 Health and Shield every second up to +120 Health and Shield. Can be used while moving. Both Available
Revive Items which are able to revive the player from being downed or eliminated.
Self Revive Device Allows players to begin the revive process on themself without input from a teammate and allows Solo players to enter DBNO state. Battle Royale Available
Revive Grenade Instantly revives downed teammates and heals them to 100 health. Bodyguard Unavailable
Reboot Card
Reboot Van 		Players drop Reboot Cards upon elimination, can be used at a Reboot Van to be rebooted. Both Available

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Item categorization within Battle Royale and Creative makes very little sense in the case of consumables or limited use items.
    • The Flare Gun is listed as a consumable, but the Firework Flare Gun which functions identically, is a ranged utility weapon.
    • The Flare Gun and Firework Flare Gun act like explosive weapons, but are not listed as such.
    • The Plunger Bow is listed as a crossbow despite being a bow.
    • Ranged utility/consumables seem to be random, as items which would be classified as ranged weapons are classified under consumables.
      • The Lump of Coal and Rusty Can are classified as consumables despite being persistent after use.
      • All ranged consumables are used by an external force, but by the player themselves.
    • Certain consumable items could be classified as ranged consumables such as the Junk Rift or Storm Flip.
    • The air strike is not an explosive weapon despite its attack being entirely explosive.
    • The EMP Stealth Camo is classified as an explosive weapon despite behaving like a Power.
  • Due to the mess that is classifying certain items, they have been classified under different variables.
References

References[]
